scripts.test:smoke:slack: bddgen && playwright test --project=chromium --grep @smoke; node scripts/notify-slack.js Smoke https://rheesuho.github.io/tapas-qa
scripts.test:bdd:slack: bddgen && playwright test --project=chromium; node scripts/notify-slack.js Regression https://rheesuho.github.io/tapas-qa
scripts.allure: allure-commandline generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure-commandline open allure-report
scripts.health: bddgen && playwright test --project=chromium; npm run report
